reviews.review_description: I’ve been playing for about two weeks now and it’s been pretty informational. I learned new things I didn’t know before

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! 😄Glad to hear you’re enjoying it and even learning new things along the way. That’s exactly our intention  We really appreciate the support!

reviews.review_description: The game is fun and informative at the same time. It gives us the chance to experience what it's like to work as a dentist while learning about dental tools and procedures in an interactive way.The gameplay is engaging and easy to understand, making it enjoyable for both beginners and those curious about dentistry. Overall, a great mix of education and entertainment.

developer_response.body: Thank you! I'm really glad you enjoyed the experience.

reviews.review_description: I think the game is pretty good with the dental lessons and the experience but I wish it was a little realistic. Like where is the gloves for the hands? The hands look dirty as well as you work on the patient lol and the mirror is a little too big. And I wish you can use your fingers to move the lips and the mouth around like you actually but above all its ok just wish it was a little more realistic.

developer_response.body:
In version 0.4, we’ve added the white procedural gloves as you suggested — sorry for the delay.

The update is coming later this week.
We’re continuously working to improve realism and immersion.
We hope you enjoy it even more — thanks again for your support! 🦷✨

reviews.review_description: Super fun game, tons of stuff to do. The devs actually listen to the community on Discord and it keeps getting better with update!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot! Really glad you enjoyed the game.

reviews.review_description: this game was very fun and i felt like a real dentist, i played this for hours and i find it very interesting and satisfying. i recommend adding more appointments types and maybe ai driven dialogue so you could speak to them naturally and they could respond. other than that the gameplay was really good and fun!

developer_response.body: Fantastic idea about AI-driven dialogue! Imagine patients talking about their dental issues and daily lives during treatment — that would add a lot of immersion. Definitely an interesting feature, thanks for the suggestion!

reviews.review_description:
A brilliant mix of gameplay and learning. What starts off as a fun, slightly chaotic experience quickly turns into something genuinely informative—you actually pick up real knowledge about dental tools and procedures while playing.

The controls are intuitive, making it easy to jump straight in, the physics and interactions feel satisfying.  This is early release and there are slight glitches in the graphics with clipping as you put tools in the mouth and it feels just a little clumsy, but I am sure this will be sorted soon.

What really stands out is how it balances humour with education. It never feels like a lesson, yet you come away knowing more than you expected. I do feel the ladies on the table need a modesty gown, you get an image I am not sure you are supposed to, I am just glad she was wearing underwear, i will say no more lol...

Its recommended for anyone looking for something different in VR—fun, engaging, and oddly rewarding!

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your detailed and thoughtful review!
We’re really glad you enjoyed the mix of fun and learning — that’s exactly what we aim for.

We also appreciate your feedback regarding the visuals and minor clipping issues. We’re continuously working to improve these aspects.

Regarding the clothing, thank you for pointing this out. We understand the importance of maintaining a fully appropriate and professional presentation, especially in a medical context. We will review this aspect carefully and consider improvements to ensure a more consistent and comfortable experience for all players.

Once again, thank you for playing and for your support!

reviews.review_title: As an oral surgery EFDA- I love it!
reviews.review_description: I love this. It’s cute and fun. It helps that I’m already in the dental field- I’m used to using the universal numbering system for teeth- so this system is new to me and took time to memorize. It’s a little glitchy at times but not too bad. I love games like this! Thank you. I’ve only just started but I’m excited to explore it more!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your amazing feedback! 🙏🦷 It means a lot, especially from someone in the dental field. Keep exploring and sharing your thoughts—join us on Discord too! 💙👉 https://discord.gg/fxBhUuuSRc

reviews.review_description: Game is fun but for me I’m small and that makes the game not fun because I have to put the chair so far down and even that I can see the entire mouth

developer_response.body:
Interesting feedback! In the next update, we will add a quick button that automatically lowers the dental chair to its minimum height. We believe this will make the adjustment much easier — and faster — for players who are shorter. What do you think?

We know that height can be a challenge in VR, and we’d love to hear more about your experience. If you’d like, you’re very welcome to join our Discord so we can talk more about it: https://discord.com/invite/fxBhUuuSRc

reviews.review_description: Hi this is a great simulation but i need help. I'm at the last step of the tutorial. I need to do a mental nerve anesthesia ... i tried the needle everywhere and nothing seems to happen. Please help me :)

developer_response.body: Thanks for reaching out! 🙏 This mission is tough by design for real dental practice, but we’ll make it more visual soon. Meanwhile, join our Discord for tips and tricks to master it faster! 💙

reviews.review_description:
Dentist Simulator 2 is a highly detailed and surprisingly professional VR simulation. Instead of going for goofy fun, the game dives deep into the actual craft of dentistry—teaching you the tools, terminology, and techniques step by step.

You begin with theory, then move into practice, where the gestures are accurate enough to make mistakes—and see realistic consequences like bleeding gums. The inclusion of small but essential tasks, such as sanitizing tools or visiting the pharmacy to acquire new gadgets after completing procedures, adds to the immersion.

This isn’t just a game—it’s a learning experience that lets you explore a profession in a hands-on, engaging way. Well thought out, highly detailed, and strongly recommended for anyone curious about dentistry or serious VR training sims.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your feedback! 💚 It’s amazing to see the game bringing fun, realism, and learning together — your support inspires us to keep improving! 🦷🚀

reviews.review_title: Amazing game and would love more
reviews.review_description: This game is so fun and for someone who is interested in dentistry, it is amazing. I do wish that more procedures become available like root canals. Also, i wish every patients teeth werent all the same and white and perfect  and showed cavities or defects. Game is unbelievably fun though.

developer_response.body: Haha, love your comment! 😄 We’re planning more procedures, different teeth, and cavities — follow us on Discord to stay updated! 💙👉 https://discord.gg/fxBhUuuSRc

reviews.review_description: The developers listen to every single feedback you have they even added sandbox just for me because I thought it would make the game more fun. This game has a ton of potential

developer_response.body: Thanks so much! 💙 We love building this game with our community — features like Sandbox, headgears, and braces all came from players like you, and there’s more to come! 🚀

reviews.review_title: How am I doing it wrong
reviews.review_description: The game is very good except the guy is very mean and when ever I go into practice mode I always get it wrong when I follow the instructions as they say. But besides that the game is pretty good.

developer_response.body: Haha, true! 😅 We just improved the tutorial and the step panel — now it’s super easy to complete the mission! 🦷✅ Follow the steps and master the extraction — it’s fun and educational!
Thank you very much for the review! Have fun playing!

reviews.review_description: I'm enjoying this experience and actually it is making me want to go to dental hygiene school. It's awesome!

developer_response.body: Haha, love your comment! 😄 We’re thrilled Dentist Simulator 2 inspired you — mixing fun with real dental experience is our goal! 💚🦷✨ Got ideas for the game? 🚀
